description: Machine-readable registry of every Strand consumer type. The parity test and the atomic release workflow both read this file. See generated/consumers.md for human-readable documentation. Adding a new consumer type is one entry here plus one block in generated/consumers.md plus the package built to parity.

parity.assertion: every component in parity-manifest.json#/components is exported from src/index.ts with matching prop names
served by the same package as Preact via preact/compat; parity inherits from the preact entry
every component in parity-manifest.json#/components is exported from src/index.ts with matching prop names
every component in parity-manifest.json#/components is exported from src/index.ts with matching prop names

consumers.name: Vanilla HTML with Strand classes
consumers.install: load packages/tokens/css/* and packages/strand-ui/dist/css/strand-ui.css via link tags, plus dist/vanilla/strand-ui.js as a script tag for interactive behavior and cross-browser :has() fallbacks

parity.assertion: every CSS class in parity-manifest.json#/cssClasses is present in the built standalone strand-ui.css bundle
every token in parity-manifest.json#/tokens is defined in packages/tokens/css/tokens.css as a CSS custom property
strand-bulma-compat.css references every Strand token used by Bulma variables, and docs/migration/from-bulma.md class mappings correspond to real Strand CSS classes
every Strand class name referenced in docs/migration/from-bootstrap.md exists in the built standalone strand-ui.css bundle
